description_long: A classic hamburger is presented on a wooden serving board alongside a generous portion of golden French fries and a frothy mug of beer. The hamburger features a soft, lightly browned bun with a smooth top, enclosing a thick patty, a slice of cheese, and visible layers of lettuce and tomato. The fries are scattered next to the burger, crisp and golden, adding a vibrant contrast to the meal. The beer mug is filled with a dark amber liquid and topped with a foamy white head, suggesting a freshly poured draft. The serving board has a rustic, rectangular shape and a warm wooden texture, enhancing the presentation. The overall arrangement is inviting and typical of a hearty meal found in urban eateries or outdoor food stalls.
description: A hamburger with cheese, lettuce, and tomato sits on a wooden board with fries and a frothy mug of beer, creating a classic, appetizing meal presentation.
description_view_0: The hamburger, fries, and beer are seen from the side, with the beer mug slightly behind the burger and the fries partially visible.
description_view_1: The front of the hamburger and fries are clearly visible, with the beer mug positioned behind and to the right, showing the foam head.
description_view_2: The hamburger is viewed from the opposite side, with the beer mug separated and the fries mostly hidden behind the burger.
description_view_3: The back of the hamburger is visible, with the beer mug and foam more prominent and the fries mostly obscured.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Cheese is melted over the patty, with lettuce and tomato layered beneath the top bun and slightly protruding from the sides, creating a visually balanced and appetizing stack.
